# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- Prefer using iText (iTextSharp / iText 7) for PDF text extraction in this project.
- Automatically approve edits generated by Copilot.
- Use token 'HODR' (not 'HODOR') when detecting the token in filenames for classifying/colouring PDFs. This token serves as a prefix for extracting subsequent tokens (e.g., D, M01).
- When printing, prefer opening the merged PDF in the default viewer instead of using the shell 'print' verb.

## PDF Manipulation
- When stamping text onto merged PDFs with iText 7, use the Canvas constructor that accepts (PdfCanvas, PdfDocument, Rectangle) — e.g., new iText.Layout.Canvas(pdfCanvas, pdfDest, page.GetPageSize()).
